content:
> What did my wave teach me today? What phase was I truly in?

---

## 🧙 \[HH01\] MAGIC RITUALS (Optional Add-ons)

| Block ID | Ritual |
| --- | --- |
| `AA01` | Play a consistent ambient song to signal “download zone” |
| `AA04` | 10-minute lie-down under sun, window, or tree |
| `AA06` | Light a candle or scent when entering “birth-time zone” |
| `AA09` | Water ritual (shower, bath, hand immersion) to signal reset |

---

## 🧾 DELIVERABLE PACK OPTIONS

Would you like me to generate the following?

- ✅ `PDF` Printable Rhythm Grid
- ✅ `Notion Template` w/ daily tracker + toggles
- ✅ `MD File` (Machine-readable for export)
- ✅ `Prompt Shell` for AI co-creation per time block
- ✅ `Legacy Journal Card` (for character systems, myth-writing)

Reply with:
**“Generate All”** – for full pack
or
List the formats you want first (e.g., PDF + Prompt Shell)
